name: ai-eye-test
description: Domain-neutral VLM vision benchmark dataset. Tests cognitive capabilities (fine-detail, small-target, dense-count, small-text, labeled-grid, ab-compare, layout-hierarchy, chart-read) across subject matter. Purpose-built to reveal resolution-sensitivity deltas between VLMs.
notes: No LoRA by default — outputs should stay stylistically neutral so the dataset works across domains (game UI, web UI, documents, photos). Individual subcategories may override checkpoint/LoRA in their workflow profile.
